programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Witch Trash

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves
programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar's get-rich-quick scheme is thwarted by Emma. Davis secretly borrows Brent's car.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's 40th birthday celebration includes a disastrous fireworks display. Karen mediates a cake-baking feud.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey unexpectedly wins an eating contest. Emma enjoys her new MP3 player, while Oscar takes advantage of it.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey sponsor Davis' soccer team. Karen's fear of driving leads Hank to chauffeur her.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's self-serve idea at Corner Gas backfires. Lacey's buffet is too successful.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's A/C setting irks Hank. Lacey and Wanda care for an abandoned pet.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen is wrongly accused of stealing. Wanda tries to guess Hank's email password.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey is the sole guest at Oscar and Emma's hot tub party. Davis is Dog River's safety mascot.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank, Karen and Wanda try to break one another's New Year's resolutions.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent competes with Lacey and Hank to prove his Roughriders fandom. Davis teaches Wanda about mixed CDs.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Car Trouble

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Birthday

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Love Strikes
programme.desc: Fearing they'll be separated forever if Ray and Lisa marry other people, Tia and Tamera plot to derail Ray's new romance.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Mothers & Other Strangers
programme.desc: When Lisa's disapproving mother comes for a visit, Ray agrees to pose as her husband.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Concert
programme.desc: After their parents forbid them to attend a rap concert, the twins sneak out of the house to meet their idol anyway.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Hair Today
programme.desc: Tamera's glamorous new look gets her into a snobby clique -- but threatens her relationship with Tia, who's been snubbed by the same crowd.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Get a Job
programme.desc: Bored with their jobs at Ray's limousine company, the twins secretly start working at a burger stand and quickly learn the perils of trying to be in two places at the same time.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Joeys Choice
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera face "double trouble" when the same guy unknowingly asks them both out on the same date!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: A Tall Tale
programme.desc: Prom night could wind up being a date with disaster when Tia and Tamera's escorts behave badly, and Roger's date towers over him.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Its a Love Thang
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Tamera, Lisa, and Ray all have close encounters of the romantic kind.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Sex, Lies and Books
programme.desc: William tells Monica the truth, Maya’s divorce sends her into the arms of another, and Joan hosts a snooty book club.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Stiff Good Man is Easy to Find
programme.desc: William’s girlfriend encourages him to cheat on her, and Toni can’t decide whether to marry Todd or dump him.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Runaway Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Ellis suspects Joan’s unhappiness has more to do with Toni’s wedding than their relationship.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Single Mama Drama
programme.desc: Maya makes a new friend that her old friends don’t like, and Lynn fakes her birthday to collect on a cash prize.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Pact
programme.desc: Joan’s former romantic rival drops a bombshell, and William’s former boss dangles a tantalizing offer in his face.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Where Everyone Knows My Name
programme.desc: Maya is upset after she sees Darnell with a new woman.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Too Much Sharkin
programme.desc: Joan blows the lid off William’s office romance.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Wedding, Part I
programme.desc: The beginning of Toni’s life with Todd could spell the end of her friendship with Joan.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Wedding, Part II
programme.desc: Toni and Joan confront crises with their men – and each other.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Blood is Thicker Than Liquor
programme.desc: A family crisis erupts on the eve of Toni and Todd’s wedding.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Fast Track and the Furious
programme.desc: Maya goes to work for William.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A stuntman's daughter hires Michael to perform in her father's place when he is injured by a greedy land developer's hit man.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A maverick politician is in danger and Michael’s job is to protect her.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Ranchers wage war with unscrupulous politicians over water rights in a desert valley, and Michael and the Knight-2000 come to the rescue.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to cover up a prison death by manipulating the law - and Devon Miles.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: K.I.T.T. has met his match when two vandals unlock a car identical to the Knight-2000 in every way but one - this version is programmed for destruction.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn is ecstatic when he discovers he's finally been invited to participate in a prestigious paranormal convention for police consultants.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Gus' nightmares start to feel like reality when he and Shawn work to solve an unlikely case for the SBPD.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus help Detective Lassiter enlist the help of Henry and Woody to solve the murder of a real estate executive.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: The hour-long special bids farewell to USA Network's favorite detective duo.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: When the Santa Barbara police department hit a wall on a high profile kidnapping case, they reluctantly hire Shawn Spencer, the town's newest psychic detective, to help solve the crime.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus investigate the mysterious death of the Spellmaster at the Regional Spelling Bee.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Fields
programme.desc: Liam investigates a mission run by the Church of the Companions when a friend of his disappears. Sandoval and the Taelons are concerned about "the fields" where something vital to the Taelons' survival is harvested.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Apparition
programme.desc: Liam investigates the suspicious death of a banker, which he saw in a dream. It seems to be an exiled Taelon spirit that is contacting him. Da'an berates Zo'or for his money and power hungry attitude.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: One Taelon Avenue
programme.desc: Joshua Doors is running his own technology development company and Renee goes undercover to find out what is going on. An artificial intelligence program of the Taelons that controls human minds seems to be acting on its own.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Abduction
programme.desc: A volunteer who was working to interpret an ancient message from Ma'el assaults Da'an and escapes through a portal. Sandoval helps Da'an avoid interrogation from Zo'or while they try to locate her.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Arrival
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica. There are Jiridians aboard, but two of the passengers escape. When Augur discovers Lili's blood on the ship, he is convinced that she is not dead.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Forge of Creation
programme.desc: Lili, Vorjak, and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth. Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons. Augur is on the run from volunteers, but sends a friend (Juliet) to help Liam while he's gone.

programme.title: The Lost World: Suspicion
programme.desc: Finn joins the explorers at the Treehouse. A team of archeologists suffer disease, violence, and distrust after opening an ancient urn that may have housed a demonic spirit.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Imposters
programme.desc: The explorers seek out a portal, but are overtaken by a force that replaces Marguerite, Roxton, and Challenger with three demons. With an age of chaos impending, Finn must bring back her friends.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Elixir
programme.desc: Challenger tests his nutritional elixir, but the drink causes hallucinations of his wife and younger self to appear in the treehouse. The others must find a cure before his visions become deadly.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tapestry
programme.desc: Challenger is taken captive by a WWI transport pilot guarding a crashed plane full of stolen iridium ingots. He, Roxton, and Marguerite relive their deepest secrets, each connected to the cargo.

programme.title: The Lost World: Legacy
programme.desc: An old enemy returns with a powerful artifact that could give him total power over the plateau. Veronica believes that her mother's pendant is leading her back to her parents.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E5 - The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: Chiana discovers a recording with Moya's original Pilot. After seeing the recording and realizing Aeryn was involved, Pilot orders Aeryn to leave Moya

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E6 - Picture If You Will
programme.desc: Chiana buys a picture in a store, which is more than it seems. The picture changes and shows Chiana what will happen to her.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E7 - Home On The Remains
programme.desc: The crew needs food. Zhaan needs to eat meat and starts spewing spores. Only Aeryn seems to have a tolerance for the spores.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E8 - Dream A Little Dream
programme.desc: While waiting for Moya to pick their Transport Pod, Zhaan tells Crichton of Moya's adventures after the Gammak base was destroyed.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E9 - Out Of Their Minds
programme.desc: An alien ship fires a weapon at Moya. The blast makes it through and causes everyone's consciousness to jump into another body.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E10 - My Three Crichtons
programme.desc: A strange globe appears on Moya, sucking in Crichton and duplicating him creating two additional people.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 226
programme.desc: Can you bob for an apple during a 100-foot bungee jump? Can you really play tennis on an airplane wing mid-flight?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 176
programme.desc: What can a driver use to replace a flat tire without a spare? Can a fishing reel catch fire with a fast enough fish on the line?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 51
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a cell phone cause a plane to crash? Can a person fly away on a raft filled with helium?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 157
programme.desc: Is there any way to prevent a bloodhound from tracking one's scent? Is it possible to fool a dog trained to sniff out contraband?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 213
programme.desc: If a single car brakes lightly, can it cause a ripple that triggers a major traffic jam? Is it better to stay in one lane in heavy traffic instead of changing lanes?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Gets The Real Update
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surface! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Said She'd Drown the Baby
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four year old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. It turns out that Farnsworth had a clause inserted in this will that his death, no matter what the apparent cause, would be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes uncovers a serious mystery when helping one of Watson's old friends.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Haunted Gainsborough
programme.desc: Malcolm MacGregan will lose his family's Scottish castle if he can't make the mortgage payment, by midnight.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Terror By Night
programme.desc: A murder mystery set on a speeding train, Holmes guards the transport of the 400-carat diamond. In Vibrant Colour!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Minnie, a cowgirl from a travelling western show, visits Holmes after she finds a dead body in her room.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate the legend of a supernatural hound, a beast that may be stalking a young heir on the fog-shrouded moorland that makes up his estate.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Twenty aspiring restaurateurs present their signature dishes to Ramsay -- and an audience -- in Las Vegas; while the challenge winners earn a night out on the town, the losers must head back to Los Angeles on a school bus.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the dorms; Ramsay sends contestants out of the kitchen after a rocky first dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 19 remaining chefs immediately become 18 after a dramatic walkout from one of the hopefuls. Despite Gordon attempting to teach the group about teamwork with an army-led physical challenge, a disastrous food service leads to another elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Olympic athletes Maurice Greene, Natalie Coughlin and Danell Leyva help Ramsay lead a 3K race, with the red and blue teams racing to prepare lunch for the runners; communication issues lead to fights during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must identify the type of protein used in five dishes; as the winning team enjoys its victory at a beach house, the losing team must grind and mill grains to make bread from scratch; contestants are grilled during elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay makes a decision that changes the competition; two chefs work as servers during the dinner service; each team nominates two contestants to be put up for elimination.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Snowtown: Bodies in the Barrels
programme.desc: In 1999, eight bodies are found in six barrels filled with acid in a former bank vault in rural Snowtown, 50 kilometres north of Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Business
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. As Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Felons Interrupted
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Money
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Reality Check
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identify which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A Knockout Times Two
programme.desc: Nikki 'Rocky' Parker steps into the ring to fight for her man.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Baby, You’ve Got To Go
programme.desc: When Kim’s boyfriend moves in, Nikki moves out.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Mummy’s The Word
programme.desc: For Kim, Nikki and their friends, Halloween becomes a fright night to remember.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Take The Cookies And Run
programme.desc: Nikki must find a way to sell 6,000 cookies.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: The Altos
programme.desc: Nikki suspects her new boss is actually a Mob boss.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: FAMILY TIES AND LIES
programme.desc: A game show appearance reveals a startling Parkers family secret.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Secret Santa
programme.desc: Everyone learns the true meaning of Christmas after getting locked inside a department store.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Way Mork Were
programme.desc: Fred confesses that he's having marital difficulties, so Mork and Mindy relay stories of their troubled times.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Putting the Ork Back In Mork (Part 2)
programme.desc: It could be Mork's last night on Earth when an ancient Orkan elder who looks like a ten-year-old boy arrives with the news that Mork must return to Ork for forecycling because he has picked up too many Earthly ways.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: There's A New Mork In Town
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Meets Robin Williams

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy, Mindy, Mindy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork The Swinging Single

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz investigates sunburns; making museum visitors act younger and smarter.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance

programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Eyes on the Prize

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duel for Redemption

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Soul Solutions
programme.desc: Determined to defeat Dragan and his Nordic God, Jack summons a mighty new monster to the field that has enough fire power to send all of Dragan's life points up in smoke!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: When Nordic Gods Attack
programme.desc: With only a handful of life points remaining and the Nordic God, Thor, staring down at him, Jack gets set to take on his next opponent - Team Ragnarok's Broder!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Tricking the Trickster
programme.desc: After swooping in take on Team Ragnarok's Broder, Crow finds himself battling two Nordic Gods  Thor and Loki! Can Crow defeat these two dynamos, or will this dynamic duo prove to be too much for Crow and his battle-tested Blackwings?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Yusei's Last Stand
programme.desc: With the tournament on the line, Yusei must find a way to defeat Halldor before the three Nordic Gods knock his life points down to nothing!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fight to the Finish Line
programme.desc: It's the exciting conclusion to the semifinal battle between Team Ragnarok and Team 5D's! Can Yusei Fudo muster a miracle comeback against Team Ragnarok's Halldor?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: The grand finale of the World Racing Grand Prix is set to start, and our two finalists -Team 5D's and Team New World - are ready to take center stage. For Yusei, Jack and Crow, second place isn't an option!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Machines
programme.desc: It's one down and two to go for Team 5D's as Jack and his mighty Red Nova Dragon get set to take on and take out Primo and Jakob of Team New World!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Against All Odds
programme.desc: With Jack out of commission, all eyes turn to Crow as he swoops in to duel Jakob! Does Crow have what it takes to take down Team New World's best duelist, or will Crow suffer the same cruel fate that sent his teammate crashing into defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: For Synchro's Sake
programme.desc: With the safety of New Domino City hanging in the balance, Yusei Fudo from Team 5D's looks to rev it up against Team New World's Jakob in the final round of the World Racing Grand Prix!

programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. While on a trip in Africa, Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain suspect that M.A.D. agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: So It Is Written

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Gadget's Roma
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. When Quimby learns Thelma is being sent back to ancient Rome to learn the Secret of Roma inscribed on a mosaic at the Forum he sends GADGET to stop her in the time machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: In Seine

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: King Wrong
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The beautiful M.A.D. agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan. Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution.

programme.desc: M.A.D. agent, Presto Change0, impersonated Inspector Gadget at a secret meeting. Chief Quimby and Penny foil their evil plans.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Magic Gadget
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Claw schemes with two magicians, the Lesser and the Great Wambini, to steal gold bars from the bank vault.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Unhenged

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Great Wambini's Seance

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Faraway Friend/Arthur and The Square Dance
programme.desc: Arthur's in the midst of writing a great adventure story with Buster when he gets some very bad news--Buster is leaving town to go live with his Dad for a while. Then, does Francine have a crush on Arthur?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Rules/Meet Binky
programme.desc: Writing your own name in graffiti all over the school wouldn't be very smart, right? Binky says he didn't do it, so detectives Fern and Buster are on the case. Then, Binky is the newest, hottest, hippest pop music craze in Elwood City.

programme.title: Arthur: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids
programme.desc: Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Deer Friend/Buster Hits the Books
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister
programme.desc: What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.

programme.title: Arthur: What Scared Sue Ellen?/Clarissa Is Cracked
programme.desc: Sue Ellen's not afraid of much, but when she encounters a really creepy howling noise in the woods, she's scared for real. Then, Grandma Thora has a lot of fun stuff, especially her porcelain doll, Clarissa.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Almost Boring Day/The Half-Baked Sale
programme.desc: It's raining and boy is it BORING! But then, in Grandma Thora's attic, Arthur and D.W. discover some really FASCINATING stuff about their parents. Next, Grandma Thora is helping to organize a bake sale, but her goodies aren’t very good.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Venice, Anyone?
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Breathing Room
programme.desc: With quarters cramped in the cavern, Bumblebee and Fixit scout for a new living arrangement. Sideswipe and Strongarm venture out as well, and are trapped by Clampdown inside a shipping container.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prepare for Departure
programme.desc: Grimlock goofs off while on monitor duty and misses a signal alert at the Nuclear Waste Disposal site. The Bee Team still gets there in time to engage Steeljaw and his Pack, but are waylaid in a crevasse and the Decepticons get away with nuclear material.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prisoner Principles
programme.desc: When the BEE TEAM investigates a Decepticon signal near a nuclear power plant, they find QUILLFIRE and CLAMPDOWN. Quillfire escapes, but STRONGARM captures Clampdown. He reveals STEELJAW's plan to steal nuclear fuel rods from the power plant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Optimus Prime arrives to warn the Bee Team about a breach in the Shadow Zone.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Something He Ate
programme.desc: The Bee Teamers return to the Scrapyard with their Decepticon captives, and find the place completely trashed. Sideswipe, Strongarm, and Grimlock balk at being assigned clean-up duty, asserting that they're warriors, not janitors.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sick as a Bot
programme.desc: The Autobots suffer serious malfunctions after the Decepticon WINGCODE exposes them to harmful nanoparticles in an attempt to get her claws on the team's stash of Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Five Fugitives
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to catch their nemesis Steeljaw when they are interrupted by Strongarm's old mentor DROPFORGE, who arrives from Cybertron with orders to arrest them.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Enemy of my Enemy
programme.desc: Unannounced, Optimus returns to the scrapyard with an All-Star team of Autobot allies: Ratchet, Windblade, and Jazz, as well as Drift and his Mini-Cons.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Freedom Fighters
programme.desc: Surrounded and outgunned on Cybertron, the Bee Team and Steeljaw are in danger of seeing their mission to overthrow the oppressive High Council go up in smoke.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 1
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit. With the all powerful Allspark, Megatron can use it to turn all of Earth's robots into Decepticons.

programme.title: Nadeshiko
programme.desc: How Japan overcame all odds to win the 2011 FIFA Women's World Cup.

programme.title: HD Cutz

programme.title: Property Brothers: Mindy & Paul
programme.desc: Newlyweds Mindy and Paul have decided to sacrifice their honeymoon in order to find their dream home. But after visiting more than 150 properties, they desperately need an intervention.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Lauren & Jeremy

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on the Orient Express

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette, Alya and her other friends go to eat some ice cream together at André's, a glacier. The glacier becomes influenced by Hawk Moth and turns into Glaciator, an ice cream snowman monster with the power to transform people into ice cream.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Chloé's butler gets akumatized. Now Despair Bear, he can manipulate anyone he touches and is determined to get revenge on Chloé for humiliating him.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: A toddler is akumatized into Gigantitan, a giant baby who hunts for a lollipop and destroys everything in his path. Stopping him won't be child's play.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: A new student, Kagami Tsurugi, the daughter of a famous fencer, arrives at school and challenges Adrien to show everyone she's the best fencer.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette's grandmother becomes Befana and wants to get revenge on Marinette, who would rather spend time with her friends than with her. Will Ladybug fight her?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: A young singer gets akumatized into Frightingale. Armed with a magic mike, the singer wants to turn Paris into a giant musical for everyone to join in the fun.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Adrien's bodyguard gets akumatized into Gorizilla. Endowed with extraordinary strength and an acute sense of smell, he tracks Adrien all through Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Markov, a small, sensitive robot is akumatized into Robostus, a villain who brings inanimate objects to life.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Alya's sisters are akumatized into small, out-of-control monsters named Sapotis who wreak havoc in Paris. Epic babysitting session ahead for our heroes.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Mr Damocles gets akumatized into Dark Owl. Armed with high-tech gadgets, he wants to get revenge on Ladybug and Cat Noir, who've humiliated him.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu visits his injured sister in hospital. The class outing takes them to see a sculptor. Pingu accompanies his sister to the nursery. Only Pingu is curious when strangers pass through the village.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Mother and Father wish to go to a concert. Pingu and his sister help with the tedious household chores. Pingu, his sister, and Robby build an enormous snowman. Pingu plays with wooden blocks.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friend go cross-country skiing. Pingu and Robby get up to all sorts of mischief. Pingu and his sister want only fish and cake for supper.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu does not want to go to school and so pretends he is ill. Pingu is inspired to be a painter. Pingu helps his neighbour and is rewarded for his kindness. A seagull steals Pingu's fish.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his friends catch a bottle containing a map. Pingu and his sister take the record player outside. A classmate throws a paper airplane, and Pingu gets the blame.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend, Pingo, teases him. Pingu is supposed to be looking after his neighbour's egg. Pingo has a brand-new toy car. Pingu plays Superman with his friend, Pingo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and his two friends want to have a fishing competition. Pingu sees a letter on the table. Robby and a friend want to play badminton without Pingu. Pingu wants to try his luck at drawing lots.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu gives his sister a shock. A postcard from the South Seas leads Pingu and his sister to decorate the house. Pingu and Robby make a discovery. Pingu goes to the baker's and steals a cake!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is put out when he loses several games of hide-and-seek. Pingu refuses to help Mother. Pingu asks Father if they can go up the mountain. Pingu goes fishing but promises to be back on time.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu decides that he is too old for toys. Pingu helps his father wipe fresh snow off the car. Pingu has a day off school.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu's friend plays with a kite outside the house. Pingu discovers a magnet. Pingu plays with his boat on the water. Pingu plays with his toys when he falls asleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Thomas and Jack having fun playing on the beach and building sandcastles. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: All four Teletubbies go under the slide. The Teletubbies watch some children go over a stile, under some trees and through a gate. When Laa-Laa goes for walk, Tinky Winky and Dipsy secretly follow her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies join in with the game when a voice trumpet sings Humpty Dumpty. The magic windmill brings a musical transmission featuring King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys. Po has a falling down day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children have fun moving to Drum music. In Teletubbyland, all the Teletubbies are asleep, but then Tinky Winky sings a loud song.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies pop up to see some boys who live on a farm. The boys talk about their chicks. Dipsy looks out of the window.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po and Tinky Winky love to smell flowers. They have great fun running between two groups of flowers smelling them with great big sniffs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for toast in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Yellow Cow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po say's "Eh-oh" and runs off to join the other Tubbies when they watch Andy Brown and some children go on a boat trip to feed some sealions. The Tubbies are very busy at the switch panel, pressing buttons and pushing levers.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po looks after the Teletubbies' favourite things. The Teletubbies have fun watching some children making shadows.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building an extraordinary new cave-house for Sandy Beach – a caveman expert who’s moving to the valley to study how cavemen used to live. The team are all head into the mountains.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Spud is collecting some eggs for breakfast, he spots the large amount of straw delivered the previous day and overhears Bob and Farmer Pickles having a conversation. They discuss how they are making “something new out of straw”.

programme.title: Trains and Treehouses
programme.desc: Bob and his ‘Can-Do’ crew are back on site with a brand new adventure! Join Bob as he builds a train set for Mr Bentley as a birthday surprise and helps find a family of squirrels a new tree-house home.

programme.title: Scrambler to the Rescue
programme.desc: Its winter in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his team are building a concert hall in time for a special winter celebration. Scrambler is especially keen to help – but is frustrated that there’s nothing for an energetic quad-bike to do!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has bought a new attachment for Benny to try. It looks a bit big and heavy, but Benny is desperate to try it out so Bob promises he can as long as he’s with him to help. Bob gets an excited phone call from Sandy Beech up at the cave house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Beasley’s pipes and boiler are making banging noises and Bob is called in to replace them. Whilst Bob and Wendy are collecting the new Boiler from JJ, Molly explains that she is looking after Mrs Broadbent’s baby rabbits.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s too busy to even tell the machines what the job is for today. He takes Scrambler to the dome and the others follow. It turns out that they are going to turn the whole of the Dome into a Visitors centre and its opening tomorrow!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Trix is looking for something to do so JJ sends her to deliver a bag of wood chippings to Bob who is building a Jungle Jim climbing frame in the school playground. Trix likes being busy and starts offering to fetch and carry everything for everyone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Now that Robert has taken over at the old yard, Wendy can finally move to Sunflower Valley! Bob is still in Bobsville, while the machines are in charge of setting up Wendy’s caravan, complete with solar panels, as a special surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been asked to install a new air conditioning unit at Mr Sabatini’s restaurant. Wendy and Molly meanwhile have been asked to redecorate the library at the school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert and Dot, Bob’s Mum and Dad are visiting the Valley. Bob shows them around, pointing out their recycling storeroom. Robert notices Bob’s old rubble chute. Bob explains that he hasn’t had much use for it out in the valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and Dizzy have spent the night at Bob’s old yard in Bobsville to help Wendy with some digging and mixing. The machines all wish that Wendy could come and live out in Sunflower Valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Somebody walking there!
programme.desc: In this episode of the paranormal investigation series, the AYH team investigate a venue that has an intriguing history. Phil and Dale get a fright; Sara has a thought-provoking, emotional moment; and Jane becomes rather tongue-tied over it all.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Creeped out
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team investigate a fascinating location, with a very varied history. Original AYH team member Tim rejoins the gang for the night, and everyone seems to be uneasy and on edge...but why?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: This doesn’t seem real!
programme.desc: Whilst investigating a very old and historical building, the AYH team encounter mysterious footsteps, unexplained taps and other noises seemingly on request. But at which one of the three venues on offer is this paranormal activity taking place?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Something foreboding"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil and the Are You Haunted team head to South Yorkshire, where a venue with military connections awaits investigation. Based on personal experiences, will the team think this venue is haunted, or not; and will you agree with their decision?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In small town Ohio, a respected state trooper reports his wife missing. Then he tells the police she’s run off with a secret lover. But has she?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Walk of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1970, eighteen-year-old Olive Waiker disappeared as she walked across Rotorua to babysit her nieces and nephews. Her semi-naked body was found hours later in a rest area south of the city..

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation takes the team to the condemned cell and execution room. Is it a hangman or one of the executed souls that makes itself present and causes the team to re-evaluate what they are doing.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 3
programme.desc: The concluding part of the teams biggest investigation sees Yvette get the biggest shock of.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Abbey House Museum
programme.desc: Yvette introduces a brand new Most Haunted team member, Watson, a bulldog. This location starts to give up its mysteries as soon as the team arrive and they have go film differently to accommodate a particularly aggressive poltergeist.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse stable
programme.desc: The first team ever to be allowed into the very haunted Wentworth Woodhouse Stable Block and the team film the best evidence ever, has a ghost been caught on camera? Watson sees something and team see someone who couldn’t possibly have been there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Slaughter House
programme.desc: The Slaughterhouse is Liverpool’s oldest pub and gives the team more than they bargained for as object are moved from underneath the team’s noses.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Uninvited
programme.desc: Meriden, Connecticut natives Lynn and Jason Ryder purchase a historic restaurant, thinking it will be an adventure to operate an establishment so much a part of their youth. Little do they know their experience is about to turn into their worst nightmare.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Calling
programme.desc: Rebecca hears spirits but is able to ignore them until one emerges who refuses to be ignored.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.desc: In a world of anthropomorphic vehicles, Cory Carson, a friendly little orange car, learns to make his way through the childhood struggles of starting school, making friends, and learning responsibility.
